_schemaDescription: Risk Assessment – Audit Universe & Entity sample payload. 7 entities total, 5 scored. Categories: Low Risk/Yearly (5 entities). 2 unscored entities. Control weakness derived from inherent × residual risk category per entity. Category labels and audit frequency mappings are client-configured (not hardcoded).

_controlWeaknessRef.Weak controls: Inherent High + Residual High — controls not reducing risk
_controlWeaknessRef.Strong controls: Inherent High + Residual Low — controls working well
_controlWeaknessRef.Low-risk area: Inherent Low + Residual Low — inherently low risk, well managed
_controlWeaknessRef.Control failure / anomaly: Inherent Low + Residual High — unexpected high residual despite low inherent risk

riskDistribution.description: 5 scored entities: 5 Low Risk (Yearly). 2 entities unscored.

priorityEntities.description: Top entities by residual score requiring immediate audit attention.
